title: Sylvara — Project Knowledge Base
content:
# Sylvara — Project Knowledge Base
> Created: 2026-03-13

## Project Overview
- Sylvara is a CRM and operations platform for the tree service industry [EXPLICIT]
- Built initially for Iron Tree Service, but multi-tenant from day one for eventual SaaS [EXPLICIT]
- Product tagline: "From root to revenue — where tree service businesses grow." [EXPLICIT]
- The Scheduling App is the first module — it replaces Iron Tree's backlog tracking spreadsheet [EXPLICIT]
- The scheduling module will later merge into the broader Sylvara CRM suite [EXPLICIT]
- Property-centric schema (v1.2): job history belongs to a physical location, not just a person [EXPLICIT]

## Key Stakeholders
- **John Maestranzi** — co-owner, Iron Tree Service (john@irontreeservice.com) [EXPLICIT]
- **Eric Roensch** — co-owner, Iron Tree Service (eric@irontreeservice.com) [EXPLICIT]
- **Cole Wichman** — admin, data analyst, builder (cole@irontreeservice.com) [EXPLICIT]
- **Savannah** — office staff, account pending (sent sign-in link 2026-03-13) [EXPLICIT]

## Current Status
- Scheduling App deployed to production at scheduler.sylvara.app [EXPLICIT]
- Demo for John and Eric scheduled for Monday 2026-03-16 [EXPLICIT]
- Demo moved from Friday 2026-03-13 to Monday [EXPLICIT]
- Cole is the only MANAGER user currently — will promote John/Eric after they sign in [EXPLICIT]
- Real Iron Tree data imported and live in production DB [INFERRED]

## Tech Stack (locked for beta)
- **Runtime:** Node.js LTS [EXPLICIT]
- **Package manager:** pnpm [EXPLICIT]
- **Monorepo:** Turborepo [EXPLICIT]
- **Web app:** Next.js 15 (App Router) + React + TypeScript [EXPLICIT]
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS (no paid UI libs; shadcn/ui allowed) [EXPLICIT]
- **API server:** Fastify + TypeScript in `apps/api` [EXPLICIT]
- **Database:** PostgreSQL (Railway-hosted in prod) [EXPLICIT]
- **ORM:** Prisma [EXPLICIT]
- **Validation:** Zod (shared between web/api) [EXPLICIT]
- **Auth:** Clerk (`@clerk/nextjs` + `@clerk/backend`) with Google OAuth [EXPLICIT]
- **Testing:** Vitest (unit/integration) + Playwright (E2E) [EXPLICIT]
- **Date/time:** Luxon only inside shared time helpers; UTC storage everywhere [EXPLICIT]
- **Primary keys:** UUID on all tables — locked, non-negotiable [EXPLICIT]

## Deployment & Infrastructure
- **Web:** Railway (Next.js service) → scheduler.sylvara.app [EXPLICIT]
- **API:** Railway (Fastify service) → internal Railway networking [EXPLICIT]
- **Database:** Railway PostgreSQL [EXPLICIT]
- **DNS/CDN:** Cloudflare (sylvara.app registered there) [EXPLICIT]
- **Auth:** Clerk production instance (separate from dev) [EXPLICIT]
- Deploy process: push to main → Railway auto-deploys both services [EXPLICIT]

## Auth & Users
- Three roles: MANAGER, SCHEDULER, VIEWER [EXPLICIT]
- New users created via Clerk webhook → default to VIEWER [EXPLICIT]
- Role promotion done in-app via Admin page (MANAGER only) [EXPLICIT]
- JWT publicMetadata carries userId + role; self-heals if stale [EXPLICIT]
- Google OAuth is the only sign-in method [INFERRED]
- Domain restriction configured in Clerk dashboard [EXPLICIT]

## Known Issues & Workarounds
- Webhook raw body re-serialization: Fastify handler uses `JSON.stringify(request.body)` instead of actual raw body for Svix verification — security finding, needs fix [EXPLICIT]
- `orgSettings.findFirst()` missing `deletedAt: null` in 9 locations — soft-delete bypass [EXPLICIT]
- No rate limiting anywhere in the codebase — deferred post-Monday [EXPLICIT]
- Clerk test webhook events always 400 with real secret — expected behavior, not a bug [EXPLICIT]
- Production Clerk user IDs differ from dev instance — DB records must be updated when migrating [INFERRED]
- CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS must include `https://` prefix [EXPLICIT]
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY` baked in at build time — must trigger rebuild after changing [EXPLICIT]

## Post-Demo Backlog
- Toast notifications: primitives built, not wired up [EXPLICIT]
- Tier 2 UI refactor: deferred post-demo [EXPLICIT]
- Rate limiting: install @fastify/rate-limit [EXPLICIT]
- Webhook raw body fix (security HIGH) [EXPLICIT]
- Soft-delete filter consistency fix (security HIGH) [EXPLICIT]
- Missing `.max()` on Zod string fields (security MEDIUM) [EXPLICIT]
- GET endpoint role restrictions: by design, all authenticated users have full read — document don't fix [EXPLICIT]

## Open Questions
- When will Sylvara CRM merge happen? (Scheduling module is the "more advanced side") [ASSUMED: post-launch]
- Will additional sign-in methods beyond Google OAuth be needed? [ASSUMED: not for beta]
- Multi-tenant: `tenant_id` not yet in scheduling module — what's the migration plan? [INFERRED: deferred to merge]


---
**2026-03-16T00:37:22.025050-07:00 | Created via Engram**
